title: Pseudoboivinella subverticillata
taxonomy: Pseudoboivinella subverticillata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. It belongs to the genus Pseudoboivinella, which is a part of the Rubiales order. The plant is native to tropical Africa, where it is found growing in humid environments. Further classification includes its family rank, which is a part of the larger clade of flowering plants known as angiosperms. Additionally, it is classified as a dicot, one of the two main classes of flowering plants.
